pi_items.source: Task description and scripts directly require using BlenderBIM for IFC property management
Task description aligns with these AEC BIM concepts
Explicitly defined in the room_finishes_brief.txt generated by setup_task.sh
Inferred from the architectural context of the FZK-Haus IFC model and BIM tools
Explicitly defined and written to by export_result.sh
Explicitly checked in export_result.sh via ifcopenshell property set parsing
Task instructions require at least 4 spaces, and the original FZK-Haus model contains 7 spaces.
Explicitly expected output path in export_result.sh and setup instructions

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for blenderbim_env room_finish_schedule_authoring task. Verified that the primary data source is the real FZK-Haus sample model (fzk_haus.ifc) downloaded from ifcwiki.org. Confirmed the expected target output path, required Pset_SpaceCoveringRequirements property set, and required space minimum count (4) explicitly match the task instructions, export_result.sh logic, and the model's 7 available IfcSpace elements. Discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the task environment, rendering the task programmatically unscorable by the evaluation engine.
